name: Hot Crab Meat Canapes
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and drain the crab meat, removing any ligament, cartilage, or shell.
Shred the crab meat using a fork.
2. Combine the shredded crab meat, mayonnaise, lemon juice, and cayenne pepper in a bowl. Stir until well blended.
3. Spread about 1 teaspoon of the crab mixture on each cracker and sprinkle with paprika.
4. Arrange 24 canapes on a large, heat-resistant, non-metallic serving platter.
5. Heat uncovered in Microwave Oven for 3 to 3 1/2 minutes or until heated through.
6. Serve hot.
Tip: If desired, 12 canapes may be heated at a time for 1 1/2 to 2 minutes.
